display.purpose: Filament fi-header-heading and dashboard page titles only.

label.purpose: Uppercase 10px sidebar groups and table header cells via admin-polish.

body-storefront.purpose: Figtree body copy on Breeze layouts, shop, and auth.

shadows.name: breeze-card
shadows.purpose: Public dashboard KPI and chart cards (shadow-sm).

motion.name: ease-breeze
motion.purpose: Breeze buttons, nav links, theme toggle segments.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filament filled action; amber 600 default, 500 on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.666 0.179 58.318); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral outline action for non-destructive secondary tasks.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32); border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Filament field input; neutral border, primary focus ring on admin forms.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823); background: oklch(0.985 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32); border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08 / 0.25); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Filament sidebar link; primary when active, gray when idle.
components.html:
OrdersCustomers

Sales
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-group { font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938); margin: 1rem 0 0.25rem 0.75rem; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938); transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.987 0.022 95.277); color: oklch(0.666 0.179 58.318); } .ds-nav-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Stats Overview Card
components.description: CommerceOverview widget stat; flat at rest, lifted shadow on hover.
components.html:
Paid revenue

$12,480.00

All paid orders
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: oklch(0.985 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-stat-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px oklch(0.2 0.02 75 / 0.08); } .ds-stat-label { font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938); margin: 0; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823); margin: 0.5rem 0 0; } .ds-stat-desc { font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.723 0.219 149.579); margin: 0.5rem 0 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Filament semantic badge for env and tunnel states.
components.html: HMR active Built assets
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 0.375rem; } .ds-badge-success { background: oklch(0.95 0.05 149); color: oklch(0.45 0.15 149); } .ds-badge-gray { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); color: oklch(0.442 0.017 285.786); }

components.name: Auth Link Accent
components.description: Breeze auth secondary links and focus rings using amber, not indigo.
components.css: .ds-auth-link { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.666 0.179 58.318); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.125rem; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-auth-link:hover { color: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08); } .ds-auth-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Application Brand Mark
components.description: Amber-tinted icon tile with Figtree app name on nav and guest layouts.
components.html: Analytics Dashboard
components.css: .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; } .ds-brand-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.666 0.179 58.318); } .ds-brand-name { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); }

narrative.overview:
This system serves operators and developers who manage catalog, sales, access, and local dev tooling across long sessions. The Filament admin at /admin is the canonical surface: familiar Linear/Stripe density, predictable sidebar groups, and amber reserved for action and selection. The Breeze storefront and analytics dashboard share the same Laravel app but use a lighter Figtree stack with gray neutrals and selective amber on auth and brand marks.

The aesthetic is calm, capable, and operational. Surfaces stay flat at rest; depth appears only on login cards, stat tiles on hover, and modal overlays. Dark mode is first-class on both Filament and Breeze.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained amber accent on primary actions, active nav, and brand icon only
Filament v5 defaults plus admin-polish render hook for login backdrop and table/nav typography
Two registers in one repo: product admin (Inter, Filament tokens) and storefront (Figtree, Tailwind gray scale)
Semantic colors for status badges and CommerceOverview stats, never as decoration
Motion limited to 150 to 250 ms state feedback
Navigation groups fixed: Catalog, Sales, Development, Access

rules.name: The Amber Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Primary amber appears on buttons, active navigation, primary-tinted stats, and auth links only. It must not flood backgrounds, table rows, or chart fills.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Neutrals carry a slight cool gray bias in Filament and warm page wash on login. Never use pure #000 or #fff.

rules.name: The No Display in Data Rule
rules.body: Display-sized type is forbidden on table headers, form labels, and metric labels.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem sizes, not fluid clamp headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to hover, login focus, or modal overlay.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Login uses a soft radial wash, not backdrop blur or glassmorphism.

dos: Do use Filament Color::Amber as the sole admin primary via AdminPanelProvider.
Do register admin-polish on PanelsRenderHook::STYLES_AFTER for login backdrop, nav group labels, table headers, and stat hover.
Do keep navigation groups as Catalog, Sales, Development, Access with Development holding tunnel admin and playground only.
Do support dark mode on admin and Breeze with theme-init and segmented light/dark/auto toggle.
Do write empty states and widget descriptions that say what to do next.
Do use semantic Filament colors for status in CommerceOverview, not decorative gradients.
donts: Don't ship hero metrics with gradient accents and decorative motion.
Don't put display fonts or oversized display type in tables or form labels.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, or neon accents as default treatments.
Don't add orchestrated page-load animation sequences.
